title: FAA Reviews Low-Flying Boeing 777

source.title: FAA investigating Boeing 777 that was dangerously low to the ground in Texas

segments.title: Video Prompts Review
segments.audioText: Tonight, this social media video showing a Boeing 777 plane flying dangerously low to the ground, prompting an FAA investigation.
segments.transcript: Tonight, this social media video showing a Boeing 777 plane flying dangerously low to the ground, prompting an FAA investigation.
segments.translationZh: 今晚，呢段社交媒體影片顯示一架波音 777 飛得離地面危險咁低，令 FAA 展開調查。

points.label: this social media video
points.explanationZh: 新聞報道常用 this... video 帶出畫面來源；social media video 即網上流傳片段。

points.label: flying dangerously low
points.explanationZh: dangerously low 係危險咁低；聽嗰陣留意副詞 dangerously 修飾 low。

points.label: prompting an FAA investigation
points.explanationZh: prompting 即『引發、促使』；後面接調查或行動，新聞好常見。

segments.title: Watch the Wing
segments.audioText: Pay close attention to the right wing of the plane, nearly hitting the ground as it buzzes over a private airport in Horseshoe Bay, Texas.
segments.transcript: Pay close attention to the right wing of the plane, nearly hitting the ground as it buzzes over a private airport in Horseshoe Bay, Texas.
segments.translationZh: 留心睇飛機右邊機翼，佢飛越德州 Horseshoe Bay 一個私人機場時，幾乎掂到地面。

points.label: Pay close attention to
points.explanationZh: 即『特別留意』；報道員引導觀眾睇畫面細節時常用。

points.label: nearly hitting the ground
points.explanationZh: nearly 即差啲；hitting the ground 係掂到地面。

points.label: as it buzzes over
points.explanationZh: buzzes over 有低飛掠過嘅感覺；as 連住同時間發生嘅動作。

segments.title: Flight Data
segments.audioText: Flightradar24 data showing the plane was less than 25 feet off the ground.
segments.transcript: Flightradar24 data showing the plane was less than 25 feet off the ground.
segments.translationZh: Flightradar24 數據顯示，架飛機離地少過 25 呎。

points.label: data showing
points.explanationZh: 新聞會用 data showing... 快速講『數據顯示』，句子可以好精簡。

points.label: less than 25 feet
points.explanationZh: less than 即少過；聽數字時先抓 25，再聽 feet。

points.label: off the ground
points.explanationZh: off the ground 即離地；航空同交通報道常用。

segments.title: Company Response
segments.audioText: The company saying the plane was conducting a low pass flight in a manner that does not reflect operational standards.
segments.transcript: The company saying the plane was conducting a low pass flight in a manner that does not reflect operational standards.
segments.translationZh: 公司表示，架飛機當時進行低空掠過飛行，但方式並不反映營運標準。

points.label: conducting a low pass flight
points.explanationZh: conducting 即進行；low pass flight 係低空掠過飛行。

points.label: in a manner that
points.explanationZh: manner 即方式；in a manner that... 用嚟解釋做法係點。

points.label: does not reflect operational standards
points.explanationZh: does not reflect 即唔代表；operational standards 係營運標準。

segments.title: Expert Warning
segments.audioText: And David, aviation experts warn this pilot's maneuver was essentially a form of showing off, saying the plane's wingtip was just feet away from a potential catastrophe.
segments.transcript: And David, aviation experts warn this pilot's maneuver was essentially a form of showing off, saying the plane's wingtip was just feet away from a potential catastrophe.
segments.translationZh: David，航空專家警告，呢位機師嘅動作本質上似係炫技，飛機翼尖只係離潛在災難幾呎之差。

points.label: aviation experts warn
points.explanationZh: experts warn 係專家警告；聽到 warn 就知道後面通常係風險。

points.label: a form of showing off
points.explanationZh: showing off 即炫耀、賣弄；a form of 表示『一種……』。

points.label: just feet away
points.explanationZh: just feet away 強調距離非常近；feet 前面冇數字都表示只差幾呎。

points.label: a potential catastrophe
points.explanationZh: potential 即潛在；catastrophe 係災難，語氣好嚴重。

sentences: Tonight, this social media video showing a Boeing 777 plane flying dangerously low to the ground, prompting an FAA investigation.
Pay close attention to the right wing of the plane, nearly hitting the ground as it buzzes over a private airport in Horseshoe Bay, Texas.
Flightradar24 data showing the plane was less than 25 feet off the ground.
The company saying the plane was conducting a low pass flight in a manner that does not reflect operational standards.
And David, aviation experts warn this pilot's maneuver was essentially a form of showing off, saying the plane's wingtip was just feet away from a potential catastrophe.

vocabulary.translationZh: 呢段影片引發咗一項調查。

vocabulary.example: The right wing was close to the ground.
The plane nearly hit the ground.
The crew conducted a safety check.
vocabulary.translationZh: 機組人員進行咗安全檢查。

vocabulary.example: The company reviewed its operational standards.

vocabulary.translationZh: 專家話呢個動作有風險。

vocabulary.example: The warning described a potential catastrophe.
vocabulary.translationZh: 警告形容可能會有嚴重事故。

phrases.example: The incident is prompting an FAA investigation.
Pay close attention to the safety instructions.

phrases.phrase: less than 25 feet off the ground
phrases.example: The aircraft was less than 25 feet off the ground.
That mistake does not reflect our operational standards.
The car was just feet away from the curb.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:15 跟讀 Tonight, this social media video...，先拆成 this social media video / showing a Boeing 777 plane / flying dangerously low。
重播 00:23，先聽寫 Pay close attention to the right wing，再補 nearly hitting the ground。
用 data showing... 練替換：data showing the train was late / data showing prices were lower / data showing traffic was heavy。
用兩句英文複述：ABC reported on a Boeing 777 flying dangerously low. The FAA is now investigating the incident.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News 約 1 分 14 秒嘅航空安全新聞，主題係一架波音 777 低飛片段引發 FAA 調查。
聽力重點係報道員點樣配合畫面講解：this video showing...、pay close attention to...、data showing...。
時間碼 00:15、00:23、00:33、00:50、01:02 可以逐句重播；先聽關鍵名詞，再跟讀整句節奏。
dailyLifePractice 會延伸到旅行延誤、向職員確認資訊、以及工作上提醒安全檢查。

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking a Travel Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺機場或車站見到資訊有變，想禮貌問職員最新情況。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, do you have any update on this departure? Is the time still the same? Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, do you have any update on this departure?
lines.zh: 你好，請問呢班出發有冇最新消息？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.en: We're waiting for one more update.
lines.zh: 我哋仲等緊多一個最新消息。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Is the time still the same?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Do you have any update on...? 好自然又有禮貌，適合問航班、火車、預約、維修進度。keep an eye on the board 即留意顯示屏，喺機場同車站都啱用。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 this departure 換成 my flight、boarding 或 the delay。
drills.example: Do you have any update on boarding?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Is the time still the same? 三次，語氣保持友善。
drills.example: Is the time still the same?

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為交通安排有變，想快速通知朋友可能會遲少少。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick heads-up: my ride is running late. I might get there about ten minutes later than planned. Thanks for being flexible.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick heads-up: my ride is running late.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: No worries. Thanks for letting me know.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I might get there about ten minutes later than planned.
lines.zh: 我可能會比原定遲大約十分鐘到。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick heads-up 係好自然嘅『先通知你一聲』。Thanks for being flexible 比淨係講 sorry 更正面，適合輕微改時間。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I might get there about... later than planned 講一個遲到時間。
drills.example: I might get there about fifteen minutes later than planned.

drills.label: Short response practice
drills.prompt: 對方話 No worries，你用一句英文表示感謝。

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick Safety Check
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：工作或活動開始前，你想用簡短自然英文提醒大家檢查設備。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Just a quick reminder: please double-check the equipment before you start. If anything looks off, let me know right away.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Just a quick reminder: please double-check the equipment before you start.
lines.zh: 提一提：開始之前請再檢查一次設備。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Got it. I'll take a look now.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: If anything looks off, let me know right away.
lines.zh: 如果有任何嘢唔妥，即刻話我知。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: looks off 係美式口語，意思係睇落唔太對路。Will do 係簡短自然嘅回覆，表示『我會照做』。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 the equipment 換成 the schedule、the address 或 the form。
drills.example: Please double-check the address before you start.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 If anything looks off... 講一個安全提醒。
drills.example: If anything looks off, call me before you continue.
